# Backend CI dependencies.
-r ../requirements.txt

# Test and lint tooling used by backend-gate.
flake8
pytest
pytest-cov
pytest-mock
pytest-benchmark
mypy
pyright

# Optional runtime dependency required by tests/test_md2pdf.py.
pypdf

# Type stubs for mypy/pyright
types-requests
types-python-dateutil
types-pytz
types-PyYAML
types-setuptools
